title: Brian Redmond
compiled_truth: Brian Redmond is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-15), Brian Redmond sent 152 and received 894 emails, totalling 1046 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (72), [Anne Koehler](people/anne-koehler) (29), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (27), [Jim Coffey](people/jim-coffey) (27), [Barbara Gray](people/barbara-gray) (22).
